name: Nitrogen
mnemonic: Nahi Pasand Aise Sab Bhai

board_high_frequency_nodes.core_line: Nitrogen is highly unreactive at room temperature because of the exceptionally high **bond dissociation enthalpy** of its nitrogen-nitrogen triple bond, which requires immense thermal energy to undergo cleavage.
Nitrogen is restricted to a maximum **covalency of 4** in compounds like N2O5 and cannot form pentahalides because it **lacks vacant d-orbitals** in its valence shell, preventing octet expansion.

name: Oxygen
mnemonic: Oye Sanam Se Tera Pol Khol dunga

board_high_frequency_nodes.core_line: The decomposition of ozone (O3) into oxygen (O2) is highly spontaneous because the process is **exothermic** (negative enthalpy change) and **increases molecular chaos** (positive entropy change), driving a highly negative Gibbs free energy change.
The two oxygen-oxygen bond lengths in ozone are completely equal because the molecule is **stabilized by resonance**, which delocalizes double-bond character across both bonds.

name: Fluorine
mnemonic: Fir Call kar Bahaar Aayl Aunty

board_high_frequency_nodes.core_line: Fluorine exhibits only a **-1 oxidation state** and no positive oxidation states because it is the **most electronegative element** in the periodic table and **lacks vacant d-orbitals** to expand its octet.
The bond dissociation enthalpy of F2 is exceptionally lower than that of Cl2 because of the intense **interelectronic repulsion** between the non-bonding lone pairs on the small-sized fluorine atoms.

name: Neon
mnemonic: He Never Arrived; Kara Xero Run pe out

name: Sodium
mnemonic: He Lina ki Rab Se fariyaad

name: Magnesium
mnemonic: Beta Mange Car Scooter Baap rone se Raazi

name: Aluminum
mnemonic: Bengain Aaloo Gajar in Thela

name: Silicon
mnemonic: Chemistry sir gives sanki problem

name: Phosphorus
mnemonic: Nahi Pasand Aise Sab Bhai

board_high_frequency_nodes.core_line: White phosphorus is highly reactive and readily catches fire in air because of severe **angular strain** in its tetrahedral P4 structure, where bond angles are constrained to sixty degrees.
Orthophosphorous acid (H3PO3) readily undergoes **disproportionation** on heating to yield orthophosphoric acid (H3PO4) and phosphine (PH3), exhibiting both oxidation and reduction simultaneously.

name: Sulfur
mnemonic: Oye Sanam Se Tera Pol Khol dunga

board_high_frequency_nodes.core_line: Sulfur has a greater tendency for **catenation** than selenium because the S-S single bond is significantly stronger than the Se-Se bond, as the smaller size of sulfur minimizes lone pair-lone pair repulsions.

The **acidic strength** of group 16 hydrides increases down the group because the **H-E bond dissociation enthalpy** decreases as the atomic size of the central element increases, facilitating easier proton release.

name: Chlorine
mnemonic: Fir Call kar Bahaar Aayl Aunty

board_high_frequency_nodes.core_line: The acidic strength of chlorine oxoacids increases in the order HClO < HClO2 < HClO3 < HClO4 because the addition of highly electronegative oxygen atoms stabilizes the conjugate base through greater **resonance delocalization** of the negative charge.
Interhalogen compounds are **more reactive than halogens** (except F2) because the polar hetero-atomic X-Y bond is **weaker** than the non-polar homo-atomic X-X bond in pure diatomic halogens.

name: Argon
mnemonic: He Never Arrived; Kara Xero Run pe out

name: Potassium
mnemonic: He Lina ki Rab Se fariyaad

name: Calcium
mnemonic: Beta Mange Car Scooter Baap rone se Raazi

name: Scandium
mnemonic: Suno Tum Vivah Karlo Mujhse, Phir Koi Nahi Kahega Jaan

board_high_frequency_nodes.core_line: Scandium is regarded as a transition element because it has an incompletely filled d-orbital (**3d1**) in its ground state, which sets it apart from non-transition d-block metals like Zinc.

name: Titanium
mnemonic: Suno Tum Vivah Karlo Mujhse, Phir Koi Nahi Kahega Jaan

name: Vanadium
mnemonic: Suno Tum Vivah Karlo Mujhse, Phir Koi Nahi Kahega Jaan

name: Chromium
mnemonic: Suno Tum Vivah Karlo Mujhse, Phir Koi Nahi Kahega Jaan

board_high_frequency_nodes.core_line: Chromium adopts a **[Ar] 3d5 4s1** configuration instead of 3d4 4s2 because the exactly half-filled d-subshell gains exceptional stability due to a highly **symmetrical distribution of electrons** and **maximum exchange energy**.

name: Manganese
mnemonic: Suno Tum Vivah Karlo Mujhse, Phir Koi Nahi Kahega Jaan

board_high_frequency_nodes.core_line: Manganese exhibits the maximum number of oxidation states (ranging from +2 to +7) in the 3d series because it contains the **maximum number of unpaired electrons** ($3d^5$) available for bonding alongside the $4s$ electrons.

name: Iron
mnemonic: Suno Tum Vivah Karlo Mujhse, Phir Koi Nahi Kahega Jaan

name: Cobalt
mnemonic: Suno Tum Vivah Karlo Mujhse, Phir Koi Nahi Kahega Jaan

name: Nickel
mnemonic: Suno Tum Vivah Karlo Mujhse, Phir Koi Nahi Kahega Jaan

name: Copper
mnemonic: Suno Tum Vivah Karlo Mujhse, Phir Koi Nahi Kahega Jaan

board_high_frequency_nodes.core_line: Copper possesses a **[Ar] 3d10 4s1** configuration because a completely filled d-subshell ($3d^{10}$) yields extra electronic stability derived from structural symmetry and **high electron exchange energy**.

name: Zinc
mnemonic: Suno Tum Vivah Karlo Mujhse, Phir Koi Nahi Kahega Jaan

board_high_frequency_nodes.core_line: Zinc is **not considered a transition element** because it features a completely filled d-subshell ($3d^{10}$) in both its elemental ground state and its common stable oxidation state ($Zn^{2+}$), causing weak metallic bonding and a low enthalpy of atomization.

name: Gallium
mnemonic: Bengain Aaloo Gajar in Thela

board_high_frequency_nodes.core_line: The atomic radius of Gallium is surprisingly smaller than Aluminum because the intervening **filled 3d-orbitals offer very poor shielding**, causing the valence electrons to experience a significantly stronger effective nuclear charge.

name: Germanium
mnemonic: Chemistry sir gives sanki problem

name: Arsenic
mnemonic: Nahi Pasand Aise Sab Bhai

name: Selenium
mnemonic: Oye Sanam Se Tera Pol Khol dunga

name: Bromine
mnemonic: Fir Call kar Bahaar Aayl Aunty

board_high_frequency_nodes.core_line: Bromine is the only non-metallic element that remains liquid at room temperature because its substantial molecular size creates intermolecular **London dispersion forces** strong enough to prevent vaporization, unlike Fluorine and Chlorine.

name: Krypton
mnemonic: He Never Arrived; Kara Xero Run pe out

name: Rubidium
mnemonic: He Lina ki Rab Se fariyaad

name: Strontium
mnemonic: Beta Mange Car Scooter Baap rone se Raazi

name: Yttrium
mnemonic: Yeh Zindagi Nahi Mohabbat Tumhari, Ro Ro Kar Pukaregi Aaj Chandni

name: Zirconium
mnemonic: Yeh Zindagi Nahi Mohabbat Tumhari, Ro Ro Kar Pukaregi Aaj Chandni

board_high_frequency_nodes.core_line: Zirconium (Zr) in the 4d series has an atomic radius almost identical to Hafnium (Hf) in the 5d series due to **lanthanoid contraction**, which arises from the poor shielding capability of intervening 4f electrons.

name: Niobium
mnemonic: Yeh Zindagi Nahi Mohabbat Tumhari, Ro Ro Kar Pukaregi Aaj Chandni

name: Molybdenum
mnemonic: Yeh Zindagi Nahi Mohabbat Tumhari, Ro Ro Kar Pukaregi Aaj Chandni

board_high_frequency_nodes.core_line: Molybdenum acts as a **promoter** in Haber's Process for the manufacture of ammonia, where it enhances the catalytic activity of the finely divided Iron catalyst by modifying its surface characteristics.

name: Technetium
mnemonic: Yeh Zindagi Nahi Mohabbat Tumhari, Ro Ro Kar Pukaregi Aaj Chandni

name: Ruthenium
mnemonic: Yeh Zindagi Nahi Mohabbat Tumhari, Ro Ro Kar Pukaregi Aaj Chandni

name: Rhodium
mnemonic: Yeh Zindagi Nahi Mohabbat Tumhari, Ro Ro Kar Pukaregi Aaj Chandni

name: Palladium
mnemonic: Yeh Zindagi Nahi Mohabbat Tumhari, Ro Ro Kar Pukaregi Aaj Chandni

board_high_frequency_nodes.core_line: Palladium exhibits an exceptional anomalous ground state configuration of **[Kr] 4d10 5s0**, completely emptying its 5s subshell to maximize the total electronic exchange energy associated with a filled d-shell.

name: Silver
mnemonic: Yeh Zindagi Nahi Mohabbat Tumhari, Ro Ro Kar Pukaregi Aaj Chandni

name: Cadmium
mnemonic: Yeh Zindagi Nahi Mohabbat Tumhari, Ro Ro Kar Pukaregi Aaj Chandni

mnemonic: Bengain Aaloo Gajar in Thela

name: Tin
mnemonic: Chemistry sir gives sanki problem

name: Antimony
mnemonic: Nahi Pasand Aise Sab Bhai

name: Tellurium
mnemonic: Oye Sanam Se Tera Pol Khol dunga

name: Iodine
mnemonic: Fir Call kar Bahaar Aayl Aunty

board_high_frequency_nodes.core_line: Tincture of iodine is a powerful antiseptic formulation composed of a **2-3% elemental iodine solution** dissolved in an alcohol-water solvent mixture.

name: Xenon
mnemonic: He Never Arrived; Kara Xero Run pe out

board_high_frequency_nodes.core_line: Xenon hexafluoride ($XeF_6$) undergoes partial hydrolysis to yield stable oxyfluorides ($XeOF_4$ and $XeO_2F_2$), whereas its complete hydrolysis yields highly explosive **Xenon trioxide ($XeO_3$)** solid.

$XeF_2$ assumes a **linear geometry** (derived from a trigonal bipyramidal electron arrangement with 3 lone pairs), while $XeF_4$ achieves a stable **square planar geometry** owing to 2 axial lone pairs minimizing steric repulsion.

name: Cesium
mnemonic: He Lina ki Rab Se fariyaad

name: Barium
mnemonic: Beta Mange Car Scooter Baap rone se Raazi

name: Lanthanum
mnemonic: La HaTa Warna Re Us-Ilaake Me Pitai Aur Hogi

name: Cerium
mnemonic: Cerium Prasad Nd Pam Sameer...

board_high_frequency_nodes.core_line: $Ce^{4+}$ serves as an exceptionally strong analytical **oxidizing agent** because it readily accepts an electron to revert into the thermodynamically preferred and more stable $+3$ state characteristic of lanthanoids.

name: Praseodymium
mnemonic: Cerium Prasad Nd Pam Sameer...

name: Neodymium
mnemonic: Cerium Prasad Nd Pam Sameer...

name: Promethium
mnemonic: Sira Par Nadi Pam Samai, Eu Gadgad Tab Dil Hua, Er Tum Yab Lu

name: Samarium
mnemonic: Sira Par Nadi Pam Samai, Eu Gadgad Tab Dil Hua, Er Tum Yab Lu

name: Europium
mnemonic: Sira Par Nadi Pam Samai, Eu Gadgad Tab Dil Hua, Er Tum Yab Lu

board_high_frequency_nodes.core_line: $Eu^{2+}$ is a strong **reducing agent** because it readily loses an electron to achieve the highly stable $+3$ oxidation state, which is the most common and thermodynamically favored state for lanthanoids.

name: Gadolinium
mnemonic: Sira Par Nadi Pam Samai, Eu Gadgad Tab Dil Hua, Er Tum Yab Lu

board_high_frequency_nodes.core_line: Gadolinium has a ground state configuration of **[Xe] 4f7 5d1 6s2** instead of 4f8 6s2 because the **exactly half-filled 4f subshell ($4f^7$)** imparts extra electronic stability due to maximum exchange energy and symmetrical distribution.

name: Terbium
mnemonic: Sira Par Nadi Pam Samai, Eu Gadgad Tab Dil Hua, Er Tum Yab Lu

name: Dysprosium
mnemonic: Sira Par Nadi Pam Samai, Eu Gadgad Tab Dil Hua, Er Tum Yab Lu

name: Holmium
mnemonic: Sira Par Nadi Pam Samai, Eu Gadgad Tab Dil Hua, Er Tum Yab Lu

name: Erbium
mnemonic: Sira Par Nadi Pam Samai, Eu Gadgad Tab Dil Hua, Er Tum Yab Lu

name: Thulium
mnemonic: Sira Par Nadi Pam Samai, Eu Gadgad Tab Dil Hua, Er Tum Yab Lu

name: Ytterbium
mnemonic: Sira Par Nadi Pam Samai, Eu Gadgad Tab Dil Hua, Er Tum Yab Lu

board_high_frequency_nodes.core_line: $Yb^{2+}$ exhibits surprising chemical stability because losing two electrons yields a **completely filled 4f subshell ($4f^{14}$)**, matching the highly stable noble gas-like structural symmetry.

name: Lutetium
mnemonic: Sira Par Nadi Pam Samai, Eu Gadgad Tab Dil Hua, Er Tum Yab Lu

name: Hafnium
mnemonic: La HaTa Warna Re Us-Ilaake Me Pitai Aur Hogi

name: Tantalum
mnemonic: La HaTa Warna Re Us-Ilaake Me Pitai Aur Hogi

name: Tungsten
mnemonic: La HaTa Warna Re Us-Ilaake Me Pitai Aur Hogi

board_high_frequency_nodes.core_line: Tungsten possesses the highest melting point among all metals because it can maximize **interatomic covalent bonding** alongside metallic bonding due to its large number of unpaired d-electrons ($5d^4$).

name: Rhenium
mnemonic: La HaTa Warna Re Us-Ilaake Me Pitai Aur Hogi

name: Osmium
mnemonic: La HaTa Warna Re Us-Ilaake Me Pitai Aur Hogi

board_high_frequency_nodes.core_line: Osmium can display an exceptionally high oxidation state of **+8** in compounds like $OsO_4$ because its valence shell valence electrons are effectively involved in bonding with highly electronegative and small oxygen atoms.

name: Iridium
mnemonic: La HaTa Warna Re Us-Ilaake Me Pitai Aur Hogi

name: Platinum
mnemonic: La HaTa Warna Re Us-Ilaake Me Pitai Aur Hogi

board_high_frequency_nodes.core_line: Platinum adopts a **[Xe] 4f14 5d9 6s1** configuration due to a combination of strong relativistic stabilizing effects on the outer shell electrons and low pairing energy penalties in the sprawling 5d orbitals.

name: Gold
mnemonic: La HaTa Warna Re Us-Ilaake Me Pitai Aur Hogi

name: Mercury
mnemonic: La HaTa Warna Re Us-Ilaake Me Pitai Aur Hogi

board_high_frequency_nodes.core_line: Mercury remains a liquid at room temperature because its **completely filled 5d and 6s subshells ($5d^{10} 6s^2$)** resist participating in covalent interatomic sharing, resulting in exceptionally **weak metallic bonding** and minimal atomization enthalpy.

name: Thallium
mnemonic: Bengain Aaloo Gajar in Thela

board_high_frequency_nodes.core_line: Thallium forms stable $+1$ compounds (like $TlCl$) rather than $+3$ because the **inert pair effect** prevents the outer $6s^2$ electrons from participating in bonding due to poor shielding by intervening $d$ and $f$ electrons.

name: Lead
mnemonic: Chemistry sir gives sanki problem

board_high_frequency_nodes.core_line: Lead $+2$ compounds are thermodynamically more stable than $+4$ compounds because the reluctance of the **$6s^2$ electron pair** to unpair restricts its dominant stable oxidation state to $+2$.

name: Bismuth
mnemonic: Nahi Pasand Aise Sab Bhai

board_high_frequency_nodes.core_line: Bismuth in the $+5$ oxidation state acts as a powerful **oxidizing agent** because it readily reduces to the highly stable $+3$ state due to the intense **inert pair effect** in Period 6.

name: Polonium
mnemonic: Oye Sanam Se Tera Pol Khol dunga

name: Astatine
mnemonic: Fir Call kar Bahaar Aayl Aunty

name: Radon
mnemonic: He Never Arrived; Kara Xero Run pe out

name: Francium
mnemonic: He Lina ki Rab Se fariyaad

name: Radium
mnemonic: Beta Mange Car Scooter Baap rone se Raazi

name: Actinium
mnemonic: Accha Thoda Papad Unse Nipatenge

name: Thorium
mnemonic: Accha Thoda Papad Unse Nipatenge

name: Protactinium
mnemonic: Accha Thoda Papad Unse Nipatenge

name: Uranium
mnemonic: Accha Thoda Papad Unse Nipatenge

board_high_frequency_nodes.core_line: Unlike Lanthanoids, Actinoids like Uranium exhibit a wide range of higher oxidation states (up to $+6$ in $UO_2^{2+}$) because the **$5f$, $6d$, and $7s$ energy levels are very close in energy**, allowing more electrons to participate in bonding.

name: Neptunium
mnemonic: Accha Thoda Papad Unse Nipatenge

board_high_frequency_nodes.core_line: Neptunium and Plutonium display the maximum oxidation state of **$+7$** in the actinoid series due to the step-wise involvement of all peripheral valence electrons spanning the $5f$ and $6d$ subshells.

name: Plutonium
mnemonic: Purane Aam Kam Bikenge

name: Americium
mnemonic: Purane Aam Kam Bikenge

name: Curium
mnemonic: Purane Aam Kam Bikenge

board_high_frequency_nodes.core_line: Curium assumes a **[Rn] 5f7 6d1 7s2** ground-state configuration because an **exactly half-filled $5f^7$ subshell** offers enhanced electronic stability derived from high exchange energy.

name: Berkelium
mnemonic: Purane Aam Kam Bikenge

name: Californium
mnemonic: Coffee Aise Farmao

name: Einsteinium
mnemonic: Coffee Aise Farmao

name: Fermium
mnemonic: Coffee Aise Farmao

board_high_frequency_nodes.core_line: The **actinoid contraction** is significantly greater from element to element than the lanthanoid contraction because the **$5f$ orbitals offer poorer shielding** of outer shell electrons than the $4f$ orbitals due to their more diffuse spatial orientation.

name: Mendelevium
mnemonic: Madam Nasta Lao

board_high_frequency_nodes.core_line: Elements with atomic numbers greater than 100 follow a systematic IUPAC nomenclature derived directly from the numerical roots: **un-nil-unium** for 101, with the official symbol temporary designation until officially named after Mendeleev.

name: Oganesson
mnemonic: He Never Arrived; Kara Xero Run pe out

board_high_frequency_nodes.core_line: Oganesson is the heaviest synthetic element in Group 18, completing the **7th period** of the periodic table, and is predicted to show relativistic electron effects shifting its properties slightly from classical noble gases.
